claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: Unused forward-looking test helper
findings.summary: createHermesValidationIdempotencyKeyHandlingResult is defined for S11 forward scaffolding and does not block S10.

findings.title: Redundant idempotency length cap
findings.summary: The explicit 128-character length check is redundant with the regex cap but harmless defense-in-depth.

required_followups: Create docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s10 closeout evidence so npm run rp00:control-plane:validate passes; this is the normal post-review closeout step, not a code defect.
review_notes: Scope is confined to S10 with no edits to S01-S09 logic, other entrypoints, routes, or UI.
S02-S09, M00, permission/audit, TEN-001 through TEN-008, validation contexts, and acceptance gates are carried and pinned by the result validator.
Missing, invalid, wrong-source S09 input and every forbidden or unknown non-false idempotency claim throw fail-closed.
All hazard flags are hard false; result and receipt are frozen and metadata-only.
Policy, service, validators, tests, fixture, README, contract, and RP00 validator align; fixture parity is full deepEqual.
parsed_review.summary: RP00.P02.M03.S10 is a clean, additive, metadata-only Hermes Validation Idempotency key handling implementation. Claude reported PASS / GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings and two informational P3 findings that do not block closeout. The only required follow-up is normal S10 closeout evidence creation.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS / GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings; only P3 informational notes about a forward-looking helper and redundant length check plus the normal S10 closeout evidence follow-up.
